canonical_definition: The latent ability of a language model to internally encode numerical quantities in a structured geometric form, such as circular or linear, which supports arithmetic computation.
papers: RethinkMCTS: Refining Erroneous Thoughts inMonteCarlo Tree Search for Code Generation
